mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement ( source_id, origin_url, origin_id, title, content_html, content_text, publish_date, category, region, recruit_unit, recruit_count, contact_phone, apply_start, apply_end, exam_date, interview_date, has_attachment, status, fingerprint ) VALUES ( #{sourceId}, #{originUrl}, #{originId}, #{title}, #{contentHtml}, #{contentText}, #{publishDate}, #{category}, #{region}, #{recruitUnit}, #{recruitCount}, #{contactPhone}, #{applyStart}, #{applyEnd}, #{examDate}, #{interviewDate}, #{hasAttachment}, #{status}, #{fingerprint} )
mapper.update: UPDATE announcement SET title = #{title}, content_html = #{contentHtml}, content_text = #{contentText}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, category = #{category}, region = #{region}, recruit_unit = #{recruitUnit}, recruit_count = #{recruitCount}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, apply_start = #{applyStart}, apply_end = #{applyEnd}, exam_date = #{examDate}, interview_date = #{interviewDate}, has_attachment = #{hasAttachment}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE announcement SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE announcement SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM announcement WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY publish_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM announcement WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} ORDER BY publish_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE announcement SET status = 0 WHERE status = 1 AND publish_date < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
